analysis1_cei_reachability.description: CFG_WRITE reachable from CFG_CALL via Phase2 edges
analysis1_cei_reachability.pass_criterion: >=50% positive contracts have CFG_WRITE reachable at k<=8

analysis2_function_cfg_coverage.description: FUNCTION nodes with >=1 CFG child via CONTAINS (1-hop; REVERSE_CONTAINS excluded — runtime-only)
analysis2_function_cfg_coverage.pass_criterion: >=80% of FUNCTION nodes have >=1 CFG child via CONTAINS

analysis3_calls_connectivity.description: FUNCTION nodes that can reach >=1 other FUNCTION via CALLS within 2 hops
